annotation_target.structure: Opening melody consequent — phrase completes, stronger arrival
teaching_goals: feel the phrase completing — a long breath released
style_tips: the arrival is still pp — Satie never gets loud here
slight ritardando at the phrase end is natural

teaching_notes.note: The consequent lands more fully — but still quietly. Don't let the arrival become an accent.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 7–10 of Gymnopedie No. 1 (continuation of mm. 3–6), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 7–10 and explain how they answer the opening melody.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 7–10.

Measures 7–10 answer with the consequent: the melody completes its thought and resolves more fully. The same unhurried 3/4 flow continues. The phrase ends with a stronger sense of arrival than mm. 3–6. Let me loop mm. 7–10.
Satie Gymnopedie No. 1 mm. 7–10: melody consequent, stronger arrival. 3/4 waltz feel. Pairs with mm. 3–6.
